evals.prompt: Audit all skills under ./.ai-context/skills and generate both JSON and HTML outputs. Exclude skill-quality-auditor from the scan.
evals.expected_output: A ranked quality report with per-skill scores, quality bands, evidence, and recommendations, plus a static HTML dashboard.
expectations: The output JSON contains summary.total_skills and summary.by_band.
Every analyzed skill has total_score, max_score, quality_band, skill_tag, criteria, and recommendations fields.
At least one poor/fair/good classification appears in realistic repositories.
A static HTML dashboard file is generated referencing the same JSON-derived data.
recommendations array has at most 3 entries and each entry includes a score delta in parentheses like (+N pts).
skill_tag field is present for every skill entry in the report.

evals.prompt: Run the auditor against a subset of skills and return the top 5 highest quality skills and the poor-quality list.
evals.expected_output: A deterministic ranking plus a filtered list of poor-quality skills from the computed report.
expectations: Skills are sorted by descending total_score.
Poor-quality list only includes skills with total_score below 60.
Top 5 list contains exactly 5 entries when at least 5 skills exist.
Meta-tagged skills (skill_tag: meta) have max_score of 100 derived from META_RUBRIC weights.

evals.prompt: Inspect output evidence quality for two random skills and verify that each criterion has non-empty evidence entries.
evals.expected_output: Evidence arrays are present and useful for interpretation across all criteria.
expectations: Each criterion object includes score, max_score, status, and evidence.
Evidence arrays are not empty for scored criteria.
Critical issues are traceable back to at least one criterion status marked critical.
Evidence includes mention of detected tables, checkboxes, or code blocks when present.
YAML block scalar warnings appear in metadata_frontmatter evidence when a skill uses > or | in frontmatter.

evals.prompt: Score the fixture at evals/fixtures/poor_skill.md and verify it lands in the poor band (score < 60).
evals.expected_output: poor_skill.md scores below 60 due to missing kebab-case name, missing trigger context, and no structure.
expectations: total_score is less than 60.
quality_band is poor.
metadata_frontmatter status is critical or attention (name is not kebab-case).
trigger_description status is critical (no trigger context in description).
instruction_clarity status is critical (no headings, no steps, no checkboxes, no tables).
recommendations array contains at least 2 entries.

evals.prompt: Score the fixture at evals/fixtures/fair_skill.md and verify it lands in the fair band (60-79).
evals.expected_output: fair_skill.md scores 60-79: valid frontmatter and steps, but no tables, no evals, no code blocks.
expectations: total_score is between 60 and 79 inclusive.
quality_band is fair.
metadata_frontmatter status is good.
instruction_clarity status is good (has headings and numbered steps).
verifiability_evals status is critical (no evals/ directory).
recommendations array includes verifiability recommendation.

evals.prompt: Score the fixture at evals/fixtures/good_skill.md and verify it lands in the good band (>= 80).
evals.expected_output: good_skill.md scores >= 80: complete frontmatter, rich structure including checkboxes and tables, anti-patterns, verification criteria.
expectations: total_score is 80 or higher.
quality_band is good.
instruction_clarity evidence mentions checkboxes and table rows.
actionability_reusability evidence mentions code blocks and table rows.
safety_non_surprise status is good (has anti-patterns section).
recommendations array has at most 1 entry.
